head: current_direct_bbox
hypothesis: E-36: Cosine warmup 8ep probe. LinearLR warmup (0.1→1.0) for 3 epochs + CosineAnnealingLR for 5 epochs. Core question: does warmup improve convergence vs no-warmup cosine (E-28, 0.2893)? If best > E-28 by ≥0.005, warmup is worth 30ep verification. If not, next test OneCycleLR or regularization.
